title: The Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse
original_title: The Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse
overview: In Argentina, one daughter of patriarch Madariaga is married to a Frenchman while the other is married to a German thus leading to a crisis when Nazi Germany occupies France and some Madariaga family members fight on opposite sides.
